description:
This multiple-choice quiz assesses foundational and modern CSS knowledge, targeting developers who want to verify if their skills are professional-grade. The difficulty ranges from beginner to intermediate, framed by a conversational and slightly playful tone that uses rhetorical questions and emojis to keep learners engaged. Ultimately, it serves as a practical self-assessment tool for frontend professionals.
Topics: Modern CSS, CSS Fundamentals, Frontend Development
Audience: Frontend developers and web designers
